full_text:
THE HIVE HERALD — #10 (2026-04-23)

PULSE

FLOW
30 reward payments, 199817 PFT distributed to 18 contributors. Top earner: raL2kv...Gwzd (43400 PFT).

AIRDROPS
2 daily airdrops issued yesterday totaling 18,200 PFT. Highest: rsS2Y6...aXRZ (9,200 PFT). Lowest: r4ahFv...5XyU (9,000 PFT). 7-day leader: rsS2Y6...aXRZ (69,200 PFT, avg 9,886/day over 7 days).

MOVERS
Most active (7d): rDVKRN...tyjB (65 memos). 15 new wallet(s) this week. 34 contributor(s) went quiet (7+ days silent).

WATCH
743 sybil accounts tracked across 1 cluster(s). Bot ratio: 82.7%. 1 wallet(s) in review queue. Enforcement: active. Zero reward leaks.

DEEP CUT
